data.title: Why younger B2B buyers are calling the shots online
data.description: B2B buyers are finding generative AI (genAI) increasingly valuable for speeding up the purchasing process, says Forrester.

data.title: EBay to invest $1.2 million through its Circular Fashion Fund by 2025
data.description: EBay pledged that its Circular Fashion Fund will also provide 200 hours of mentoring and networking support for applicants from industry experts.

data.title: BigCommerce appoints three ecommerce veterans to senior management
data.description: Travis Hess, recently promoted to CEO, now has three newly appointed executives to help push forward the ecommerce technology company’s go-to-market strategy.

data.title: Where do North Americans shop online?
data.description: Digital Commerce 360 looks at the top online retailers used by North American shoppers — from Chinese marketplaces to U.S. retail giants.

data.title: CVS names new CEO as Karen Lynch steps down
data.description: David Joyner became the new CEO of CVS Health Corp. as of Oct. 17.
